positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration featuring a trio of magical woodland animals—a glowing fox, a gentle deer, and a curious owl—interacting within a glowing forest clearing. The scene should use clean, bold silhouettes against a midnight blue and deep emerald palette. Incorporate bioluminescent flora and stylized mist effects to give a sense of mystery and wonder. Focus on strong contrast and defined edges suitable for screen printing. Minimalist linework, high detail, vector art quality, symmetrical composition, flat graphic illustration style, digital painting, perfect for apparel print.
